description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, featuring a spacious open-plan layout. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large glass windows and sliding doors that provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor areas. The house includes multiple rooms, such as bedrooms, bathrooms, a kitchen, and a living area, all arranged linearly along the length of the building. A green hedge or fence runs along the front and sides, offering privacy and a touch of landscaping. The property also features a paved area, likely serving as a driveway or patio, and a small pool or water feature is visible along one side. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and functional outdoor-indoor integration.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a linear open-plan layout, surrounded by a green hedge and paved outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, and the green hedge running along the facade.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the linear arrangement of rooms, a visible pool or water feature, and the paved area extending along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back wall, additional windows, and the continuation of the hedge and paved area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the paved area, side windows, and the overall rectangular shape of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels and sliding doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large glass door, flush with the facade, and is bordered by a green hedge with no visible steps or porch.
